session.user:
Run the following command from /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report all results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report:
make fast-ci
Report the full output including pass/fail status for each check.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target to execute quick validation checks

session.assistant:
## Results Summary
**make fast-ci: PASSED**
All checks completed successfully:
1. **Lint** - Passed: All checks passed! 2. **Format Check** - Passed: 1666 files already formatted 3. **Prettier Check** - Passed: All matched files use Prettier code style! 4. **Markdown Check** - Passed 5. **Exec Reference Check** - Passed: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date 6. **ty (Type Checking)** - Passed: All checks passed! 7. **Unit Tests (erk)** - Passed: 5728 passed in 12.84s 8. **Tests (erk-dev)** - Passed: 136 passed in 4.52s 9. **Tests (erk-statusline)** - Passed: 115 passed in 0.79s 10. **Tests (erk-mcp)** - Passed: 24 tests passed 11. **CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md Validation** - Passed: All 19 CLAUDE.md files properly paired with AGENTS.md, 0 violations
**Total test results:** - 5,979 tests passed across all test suites - No failures or errors detected
